text: Netanyahu: "Every time Javier Milei visits Israel, it's right before something very big happens. Who knows what tomorrow or the day after tomorrow will bring?" 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Netanyahu and Javier Milei, President of Argentina, announced today the launch of the "Isaac Accord." The Isaac Accord is a strategic framework aimed at strengthening military & intelligence cooperation between Argentina, Israel, and soon in all countries in South America. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡与阿根廷总统哈维尔·米莱今日宣布启动“艾萨克协议”。艾萨克协议是一个旨在加强阿根廷、以色列以及未来所有南美国家之间军事与情报合作的战略框架。 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Open Source Intel Operation “Economic Fury” has been ongoing for 5+ days Iran is losing at least $438 million per day per FDD As I said before, the regime can only sustain this max for 30 days. This week the squeeze is going to hit. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报行动“经济愤怒”已持续超过5天。据保卫民主基金会（FDD）称，伊朗每天至少损失4.38亿美元。正如我之前所说，该政权最多只能维持30天。本周压力将会加剧。推文

Contributed by @AZ_Intel_ . https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046019976364978633/photo/1 tweet

text: OSINTtechnical The UAE has opened talks with the U.S. about obtaining a financial backstop in case the Iran war plunges the oil-rich Persian Gulf state into a deeper crisis -U.S. officials to the WSJ tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 阿联酋已与美国展开谈判，寻求在伊朗战争导致这个石油资源丰富的波斯湾国家陷入更深层危机时获得财政支持——美国官员向《华尔街日报》透露。推文

text: Open Source Intel Pope Leo, when he addressed the Iranian protester kiIIings in January: “My thoughts turn to the situation currently unfolding in the Middle East, especially in Iran and Syria, where ongoing tensions continue to claim many lives. I hope and pray that dialogue and peace may be patiently nurtured in pursuit of the common good of the whole of society.” REPORTER: Iran is going to execute four more protesters, including the first woman protester. What do you tell Iran? TRUMP: Tell that to the Pope https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044842864174096505/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报教皇方济各在1月份谈到伊朗抗议者被杀事件时说：“我的思绪转向目前在中东，特别是在伊朗和叙利亚展开的局势，持续的紧张局势继续夺走许多生命。我希望并祈祷，为了整个社会的共同利益，能够耐心地培育对话与和平。”记者：伊朗将再处决四名抗议者，其中包括第一位女性抗议者。您对伊朗有什么话要说？特朗普：去告诉教皇吧 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044842864174096505/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Ship should have just turned around, if it’s trouble, it’s going to get exposed to the world. Xi promised Trump no weapons are being sent to Iran. We will soon know Iran: The vessel struck by U.S. forces was traveling from China to Iran - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报这艘船本应该直接掉头，如果它有麻烦，它就会暴露在全世界面前。习近平向特朗普承诺不会向伊朗运送武器。我们很快就会知道伊朗：被美军袭击的船只当时正从中国前往伊朗 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel A few questions and thoughts: The U.S. says it warned the vessel for 6 hours. Why didn’t it stop? Was it carrying weapons or dual use materials? Did the crew think a China route gave them protection? Was this a deliberate test of the blockade? Will the U.S. reveal what was actually on board? Iran: The vessel struck by U.S. forces was traveling from China to Iran - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报几个问题和想法：美国称其对该船只发出了6小时的警告。为什么它没有停下来？它携带的是武器还是军民两用物资？船员是否认为中国航线能为他们提供保护？这是对封锁的蓄意测试吗？美国会披露船上到底装了什么吗？伊朗：被美军袭击的船只当时正从中国前往伊朗 - 开源情报推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT ELINT News RT @IDF: Following the completion of an initial examination regarding a photograph published earlier today of an IDF soldier harming a Christian symbol, it was determined that the photograph depicts an IDF soldier operating in southern Lebanon. The IDF views the incident with great severity and emphasizes that the soldier’s conduct is wholly inconsistent with the values expected of its troops. The incident is being investigated by the Northern Command and is currently being addressed through the chain of command. Appropriate measures will be taken against those involved in accordance with the findings. Furthermore, the IDF is working to assist the community in restoring the statue to its place. The IDF is operating to dismantle the terrorist infrastructure established by Hezbollah in southern Lebanon, and has no intention of harming civilian infrastructure, including religious buildings or religious symbols. The IDF is currently examining the reliability of the photograph. If this is indeed a real, recent picture, these actions do not align with the IDF's values ​​and the behavior expected of IDF soldiers. The incident will be investigated thoroughly and in depth, and if necessary, steps will be taken in accordance with the findings. - LTC Nadav Shoshani tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT ELINT News RT @IDF：在对今天早些时候发布的一张以色列国防军士兵损坏基督教象征的照片进行初步审查后，确定该照片描绘的是一名在黎巴嫩南部行动的以色列国防军士兵。以色列国防军非常严肃地看待这一事件，并强调该士兵的行为完全不符合对其部队所期望的价值观。该事件正由北方司令部进行调查，目前正通过指挥链进行处理。将根据调查结果对相关人员采取适当措施。此外，以色列国防军正在努力协助社区将雕像恢复原位。以色列国防军正在努力拆除真主党在黎巴嫩南部建立的恐怖基础设施，无意伤害包括宗教建筑或宗教象征在内的民用基础设施。以色列国防军目前正在审查该照片的真实性。如果这确实是一张真实的、近期的照片，这些行为不符合以色列国防军的价值观以及对以色列国防军士兵所期望的行为。该事件将得到彻底和深入的调查，如有必要，将根据调查结果采取措施。- 中校 Nadav Shoshani 推文

text: Open Source Intel UAE Minister Al Jaber: “50 days of a closed Hormuz: Almost 600 million barrels of oil blocked so far. 50 days of mounting pressure on LNG, jet fuel, fertilizer, and the essentials that the world depends on. Behind every missing barrel, bills go up for ordinary people everywhere. The global economy cannot afford more uncertainty. The Strait cannot operate under threat. And let's call payment for safe passage what it is: A protection racket. Hormuz belongs to the world. It must be returned to the world. Exactly as it was.” tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 阿联酋部长 Al Jaber：“霍尔木兹海峡关闭50天：迄今为止，近6亿桶石油被封锁。液化天然气、航空燃油、化肥以及世界所依赖的基本物资面临着50天不断增加的压力。在每一桶缺失的石油背后，世界各地普通民众的账单都在上涨。全球经济无法承受更多的不确定性。海峡不能在威胁下运作。让我们直言不讳地称这种安全通行费为：保护费。霍尔木兹海峡属于世界。它必须归还给世界。就像它过去那样。”推文

text: Open Source Intel In their theology, dying is winning. Surviving is winning. There is no loss. Incredible. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 在他们的神学中，死亡就是胜利。生存也是胜利。没有损失。不可思议。推文

text: Open Source Intel Irans VP: “The security of the Strait of Hormuz is not free. One cannot restrict Iran's oil exports while expecting free security for others. The choice is clear: either a free oil market for all, or the risk of significant costs for everyone. Stability in global fuel prices depends on a guaranteed and lasting end to the economic and military pressure against Iran and its allies.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗副总统：“霍尔木兹海峡的安全并非免费。人们不能在限制伊朗石油出口的同时，又指望他人的安全是免费的。选择很明确：要么所有人都能享受自由的石油市场，要么每个人都要承担巨大成本的风险。全球燃料价格的稳定取决于对伊朗及其盟友的经济和军事压力得到保证且持久的终结。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel Around 100 cars took over a Queens intersection early Saturday, lighting fires and doing burnouts near a gas station as a drivers waves a Palestinian flag. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045999116568682946/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 周六凌晨，约100辆汽车占领了皇后区的一个十字路口，在加油站附近点火并进行烧胎表演，其中一名司机挥舞着巴勒斯坦国旗。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045999116568682946/video/1 推文

text: WarMonitor When you have to kick the President of the United States out of the room in order to carry out a dangerous rescue, it’s time to kick him out of office too. When President Donald Trump learned that two American pilots had gone missing in Iran on Good Friday, he “screamed at aides for hours” and was then “kept out of the room” while his team was given minute-by-minute updates, according to the WSJ https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-screamed-aides-missing-pilots-iran-b2960603.html https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2045993391180161387/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: 战争监测 当你为了执行一次危险的救援行动而不得不将美国总统赶出房间时，也是时候将他赶出办公室了。据《华尔街日报》报道，当唐纳德·特朗普总统得知两名美国飞行员在耶稣受难日在伊朗失踪时，他“对助手大喊大叫了几个小时”，随后在团队获得实时更新时被“拒之门外”。 https://www.independent.co.uk/news/world/americas/us-politics/trump-screamed-aides-missing-pilots-iran-b2960603.html https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2045993391180161387/photo/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人 推文

text: Open Source Intel Just so we are on the same page, the crew for the Iranian cargo ship TOUSKA are in the hands of the USMC (U.S. Marines) https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045997456727343476/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 为了确保我们达成共识，伊朗货船“TOUSKA”号的船员目前掌握在美国海军陆战队（USMC）手中。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045997456727343476/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran parliament speaker Ghalibaf: “Vibe-trading digital oil is like vibe-hedging in treasuries during Hormuz risk-off. Both share one house of cards that works on paper. Difference: oil at least has Dated Brent. Treasuries? Vibes all the way down. EUCRBRDT Index GP <go” He’s obviously not writing this, we may know who it is. Zamanabadi is a suspect tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：“交易数字石油就像在霍尔木兹海峡避险情绪高涨时对国债进行对冲。两者都共享一个在纸面上行得通的纸牌屋。区别在于：石油至少有布伦特原油现货价格。国债呢？完全是靠感觉。EUCRBRDT Index GP <go” 他显然不是自己写的，我们可能知道是谁写的。扎马纳巴迪（Zamanabadi）是嫌疑人。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇰🇵🇰🇷 North Korea has fired a ballistic missile of undetermined type in an easterly direction, Yonhap reports. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇰🇵 Kim Jong Un observed the test launch of tactical ballistic missiles on April 19, according to KCNA. Five Hwasongpho-11Ra surface-to-surface missiles struck a concentrated target area of 12.5–13 hectares at operational range. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench: "🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 Trump: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Iran’s Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters warns it will respond to U.S. violation: The aggressor United States, by violating the ceasefire and committing an act of maritime piracy, fired at one of the Iranian commercial ships in the waters of the Sea of Oman and disrupted its navigation system by landing a number of its marines on board the said ship, in a blatant attack on it. We warn that the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran will soon respond to this criminal act of armed piracy by the US military, and will take appropriate countermeasures and escalate the situation. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench：“🇺🇸⚡️🇮🇷 特朗普：今天，一艘名为 TOUSKA 的伊朗籍货船，长近 900 英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海军封锁，但他们的下场并不好。美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS SPRUANCE）导弹驱逐舰……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部警告将对美国的违规行为作出回应：侵略者美国违反停火协议并实施海上盗版行为，在阿曼海海域向一艘伊朗商船开火，并通过派遣多名海军陆战队员登船干扰了其导航系统，这是对该船的公然袭击。我们警告，伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队很快将对美军这种武装盗版的犯罪行为作出回应，并将采取适当的反制措施，使局势升级。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: OSINTdefender Iran’s state-run Tasnim News Agency, which is affiliated with the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC), is claiming that Iranian forces attacked some American military ships with drones in response to today’s U.S. attack on the Iranian-flagged Touska in the Gulf of Oman. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045991951816671564/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗官方塔斯尼姆通讯社（Tasnim News Agency）隶属于伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC），声称伊朗军队用无人机袭击了一些美国军舰，以回应今天美国在阿曼湾对悬挂伊朗国旗的“Touska”号发动的袭击。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2045991951816671564/photo/1 推文

text_zh: The Spectator Index 来自叙利亚的多份报告称，以色列军机正在该国上空飞行，向东航行。推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 Tasnim reports that Iranian forces launched a drone strike at U.S. naval vessels following the attack on the ship tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 突发 🔴 塔斯尼姆通讯社报道称，在袭击发生后，伊朗军队对美国海军舰艇发动了无人机袭击。推文

text: WarMonitor Bessent telling people to cut their withholding and calling it a “real wage increase” could seriously screw people. It’s not a raise, you’re just getting your own money earlier, and if you get it wrong you could end up owing at tax time. Bessent: I want to encourage everyone out there watching today to change their withholding ... you will get an automatic real wage increase on a weekly or a monthly basis. https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2045986044550565996/video/1 - unusual_whales tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 贝森特（Bessent）告诉人们削减预扣税并称之为“实际工资增长”，这可能会严重坑害人们。这不是加薪，你只是提前拿到了自己的钱，如果算错了，你可能会在报税时欠税。贝森特：我想鼓励今天观看节目的每个人都去更改预扣税……你每周或每月都会自动获得实际工资增长。https://twitter.com/unusual_whales/status/2045986044550565996/video/1 - unusual_whales 推文

text: Open Source Intel Oil’s reaction https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045990935348048009/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 石油的反应 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2045990935348048009/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Iran says it has targeted US military vessels with drones. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗称已用无人机瞄准美国军舰。推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : Radio audio from today’s Iranian attack on the Indian-flagged crude oil tanker, M/T SANMAR HERALD, while the vessel was attempting to pass eastbound through the Strait of Hormuz, after reportedly been given permission by Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy (IRGC-N). The SANMAR HERALD has since withdrawn back to the Persian Gulf, with the IRGC-N once again announcing the total closure of the Hormuz Strait. Audio credit: @TankerTrackers tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转推 @sentdefender ：来自今天伊朗袭击悬挂印度国旗的原油油轮“M/T SANMAR HERALD”号的无线电音频，当时该船在据称获得伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军（IRGC-N）许可后，正试图向东通过霍尔木兹海峡。SANMAR HERALD号此后已撤回波斯湾，IRGC-N再次宣布完全关闭霍尔木兹海峡。音频来源：@TankerTrackers 推文

text: OSINTdefender Reports of significant activity by Israeli fighter jets tonight over Southern Syria. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 有报道称今晚以色列战斗机在叙利亚南部有重大活动。推文

text: Instant News Alerts #BREAKING : Iranian media claims retaliatory drone attacks against several US Navy vessels following US capture of Iranian tanker tweet
text_zh: Instant News Alerts #突发 ：伊朗媒体声称，在美国扣押伊朗油轮后，对几艘美国海军舰艇进行了报复性无人机袭击。推文

text: The Spectator Index Iranian state media says that the military will soon retaliate against the US military over seizure of Iran-flagged commercial vessel. tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 伊朗官方媒体称，军方很快将就扣押悬挂伊朗国旗的商船一事对美军进行报复。推文

text: Open Source Intel Calling this a “fragile truce” is generous at best tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 把这称为“脆弱的停火”充其量是客气话。推文

text: OSINTdefender The Iranian Armed Forces’ Khatam al-Anbiya Central Headquarters has stated that they will “soon respond and retaliate” for today’s U.S. attack on and seizure of an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel in the Gulf of Oman, calling it a violation of the ceasefire and “armed piracy” by the United States. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 伊朗武装部队哈塔姆·安比亚（Khatam al-Anbiya）中央总部表示，他们将“很快回应并报复”今天美国在阿曼湾对一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的货船发动的袭击和扣押，称这是对停火协议的违反，是美国的“武装海盗行为”。推文

text: Faytuks News Breaking: Iranian forces have attacked "some American military ships with drones", according to Iran's state-run Tasnim News Agency https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045988546381529307/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 突发：据伊朗官方塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，伊朗军队用“无人机袭击了一些美国军舰” https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045988546381529307/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Oil prices surge by 7% tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 油价飙升7%。推文

text: Faytuks News Arab channels are reporting heavy Israeli air force activity over Syria tonight. NEW -- Syrians are reporting large numbers of #Israel aircraft flying across southern Syria tonight, heading eastwards (towards #Iran). - Charles Lister tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 阿拉伯频道报道称，今晚以色列空军在叙利亚上空活动频繁。最新消息——叙利亚人报告称，今晚有大量 #以色列 飞机飞越叙利亚南部，向东（朝 #伊朗 方向）飞行。 - Charles Lister 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING 🔴 IRAN SAYS IT WILL RESPOND TO AMERICAS “ARMED MARITIME PIRACY” JUST IN 🔴 Islamic Regime Khatam al Anbiya Headquarters: We will soon respond to what we call America’s armed maritime piracy. 🔹 The United States violated the ceasefire and carried out an act of maritime aggression by firing on an Iranian commercial vessel in the Sea of Oman, disabling its navigation system, and deploying Marines onto the ship. 🔹 The Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran say they will respond and retaliate for this action by U.S. forces. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 突发 🔴 伊朗称将回应美国的“武装海上盗窃行为” 最新消息 🔴 伊斯兰政权哈塔姆·安比亚总部：我们将很快回应所谓的美国武装海上盗窃行为。 🔹 美国违反了停火协议，通过向阿曼海的一艘伊朗商船开火、瘫痪其导航系统并部署海军陆战队登船，实施了海上侵略行为。 🔹 伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队表示，他们将对美军的这一行动进行回应和报复。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Islamic Regime Khatam al Anbiya Headquarters: We will soon respond to what we call America’s armed maritime piracy. 🔹 The United States violated the ceasefire and carried out an act of maritime aggression by firing on an Iranian commercial vessel in the Sea of Oman, disabling its navigation system, and deploying Marines onto the ship. 🔹 The Armed Forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran say they will respond and retaliate for this action by U.S. forces. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 伊斯兰政权哈塔姆·安比亚总部：我们将很快回应所谓的美国武装海上盗窃行为。 🔹 美国违反了停火协议，通过向阿曼海的一艘伊朗商船开火、瘫痪其导航系统并部署海军陆战队登船，实施了海上侵略行为。 🔹 伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装部队表示，他们将对美军的这一行动进行回应和报复。推文
